steps.title: Look beyond visual display
steps.content: The sentence contrasts scales' known role in color and pattern with another role: absorbing solar heat. The blank needs a word for practical usefulness across more than one function.

steps.title: Choose the function word
steps.content: A suggests an inclination, B stays limited to appearance, and D suggests weakness. Utility means practical usefulness, which covers both visual display and heat absorption. The answer is C.
